raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Making an absolute causal assertion linking all suffering to mental error",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Suffering is always caused rather than uncaused",
    "The sole or decisive cause is always 'wrong thought'",
    "Thoughts can be objectively classified as right or wrong",
    "No suffering arises from external conditions independent of thought"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a universal claim but hinges on the undefined and potentially circular term 'wrong thought'",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Mental attitudes are primary determinants of suffering and individuals can reliably identify and correct 'wrong thought'",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "External or physiological factors can produce suffering irrespective of thought quality, or 'wrong thought' is defined subjectively to blame victims"
}
